# Gold Nail Spa — Ibagué, Tolima, Colombia

## What We Are
Gold Nail Spa is a premium nail salon and beauty spa located in Ibagué, Tolima, Colombia. We specialize in manicure, pedicure, acrylic nails, soft gel nails, nail art, and nail care treatments. Our salon has been operating since 2020 and is known for using 100% toxic-free products (free of TPO and DMPT) and internationally certified nail artists.

## Location
- **Address:** Cra 4 #39-171, Locales 17 y 18, Edificio Santa Elena, Santa Helena, Ibagué, Tolima, Colombia
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +57 310 616 0103
- **Email:** goldnailspa1@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://www.goldnailspa.com/
- **Google Maps:** https://maps.app.goo.gl/pTnbKszu2VyvY33J7

## Opening Hours
Monday to Saturday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM

## Services Offered (Prices in COP)
- Manicura Tradicional — from $20,000 COP
- Manicura Tradicional Hombres — from $20,000 COP
- Pies Tradicionales Mujeres — from $32,000 COP
- Manos Semipermanente Mujeres — from $48,000 COP
- Manos Semipermanente Hombres — from $40,000 COP
- Pies Semipermanente Mujeres — from $42,000 COP
- Técnica Dipping — from $75,000 COP
- Soft Gel / Press On — from $85,000 COP
- Retoque Press On — from $70,000 COP
- Acrílicas Esculpidas con Molde — from $125,000 COP
- Nail Art (various designs) — prices vary
- Retiro de Acrílicas / Gel — from $10,000 COP

## Why Choose Gold Nail Spa in Ibagué?
- 100% toxic-free products — no TPO, no DMPT
- Internationally certified nail artists
- 5-star hygiene protocols
- Personalized, luxury experience
- Premium products of professional grade
